items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 再次声明因美国政府出口管制指令，全面暂停 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的 API 访问。相对此前公告无新增技术细节，仍是合规层面的封禁。直接影响是任何调用 Fable 5 / Mythos 5 的生产环境需立即切换模型，否则将返回错误。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：把线上所有 model 名为 fable-5、mythos-5（含 -latest、日期后缀）的调用切到 Claude Opus 4.8 或 Sonnet 4.x；移除相关 fallback 配置；在告警里加 model-not-found 监控，避免再次依赖受限模型。

Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries. Produ...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 启动 Claude Corps 全国奖学金项目，面向早期职业者推广 AI 在美国各社区的应用。这是人才与品牌项目，不涉及模型版本、API 字段或 SDK 变更，对工程团队无兼容性影响。
items.backend_focus: 无，人才项目不涉及工程。无需行动。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 将 Project Glasswing 扩展到约 150 个新组织、覆盖 15 个以上国家。这是企业试点/公益项目扩容，不涉及对外公开的 API 字段、SDK 版本或模型变更。对普通开发者的调用链路无兼容性影响。
items.backend_focus: 无，企业合作扩容不涉及公开 API。无需行动；若未来 Glasswing 释放相关安全/对齐研究产出，再评估对系统提示词与安全过滤的影响。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，作为 Opus 系列升级，重点强化编码、agent 任务与专业工作能力。相对 Claude Opus 4.5 在 agent 长链路与编码基准上应有提升，但原文未给出具体 context window、max_tokens、tool use 字段变化。API 兼容性预期向后兼容，model 名称从 claude-opus-4-5 切到 claude-opus-4-8 即可。
items.backend_focus: 行动：在 API 中将 model 字段切到 claude-opus-4-8 跑回归；关注 Anthropic 公布的 system prompt、tool use 行为变化与新 deprecation 时间线；旧 Opus 4.5 暂保留作为回滚，但启动迁移计划。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 宣布首尔办公室开业并与韩国 AI 生态建立多项合作。这意味着 Claude 在韩国的区域可用性与本地合规/数据驻留支持将增强。模型版本、API 字段本身无变化，但区域/数据驻留相关能力可能影响面向韩国用户的服务部署。
items.backend_focus: 行动：服务韩国用户的团队可在 anthropic 区域/endpoint 选择上评估首尔区域对数据驻留与延迟的影响；不涉及 model 名称或 SDK 版本变更，现有调用代码无需改动。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首期 Anthropic Public Record 结果，属于公司层面的透明度与治理报告，未涉及具体模型版本、API 字段、SDK 或定价变化。对工程团队无接口级兼容性影响。
items.backend_focus: 无，透明度报告不涉及工程。无后续行动，仅作为合规与品牌信任度的参考。
